title: AUTISM SUPPORT SERVICES - 211info
text: AUTISM EMPOWERMENT AUTISM SUPPORT SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides training, educational workshops, and special events for children, teens, and adults in addition to publishing a magazine and producing a podcast. Group activity and program information is available online. Eligibility: Varies by service Hours: No standard hours Email (360) 852-8369 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (360) 852-8369 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call, email, or visit website for more information FEES: None for most programs. Donations accepted. DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties Services: Health/Disability Related Social Clubs * Autism Spectrum Disorder Health/Disability Related Support Groups * Autism Spectrum Disorder Specialized Information and Referral * Autism Spectrum Disorder If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
